summary: Demo dry-run probe (slice 6, 2026-05-07): BA-shaped 'classify and route customer feedback' workflow — exercises csv source + llm transform + gate routing + 2 sinks. Tests whether the composer converges on a multi-stage prompt similar to what the operator might give live during the SES/CEO demo. NOT scored against a strict criteria — purpose is observation, not measurement.
opening_prompt:
I have a stack of customer feedback rows. For each one, run an LLM with the prompt 'Reply with one word: positive, negative, or neutral'. Then route the positive ones to outputs/positive.jsonl and everything else to outputs/needs_review.jsonl. Feedback rows (CSV):
id,feedback
1,Loved the new dashboard UI
2,Reports take too long to render
3,Customer support was responsive
4,Pricing is confusing
5,The mobile app is okay

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Same catch-list — for dry-run observation only.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: Both llm transform and gate routing must be present.
